# Archived deploy workflow

This file preserves the old GitHub Actions deployment workflow as historical context only.

Current rule:
- Lavprishjemmeside deploys are SSH-first.
- GitHub remains the sync surface between Bolt.new and Agent Enterprise.
- cPanel is the live runtime target.

The original workflow was disabled and archived because source-only updates should not trigger GitHub-driven live deploys or generated `dist/` churn.
